hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && pnpm compile 2>&1 | tail -20; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; output=$(pnpm exec eslint --max-warnings=0 --no-warn-ignored "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "ESLint signale des erreurs/warnings sur $f. Corrigez avant de continuer:" >&2; echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '(wxt\.config|manifest\.json|\.env)' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Fichier sensible \u2014 confirmer avant modification"}}'; } 2>/dev/null || true
